firecrawl-mcp.name: Firecrawl
firecrawl-mcp.description: 强大的网页爬取和提取 MCP Server，支持单页抓取、整站爬取、结构化数据提取和网站地图生成。自动处理 JS 渲染、登录态、反爬机制，是 Agent 进行深度网页数据收集的利器。
firecrawl-mcp.description_en: A powerful web scraping and extraction MCP Server that supports single-page scraping, whole-site crawling, structured data extraction, and sitemap generation. It automatically handles JS rendering, login states, and anti-scraping mechanisms, making it an ideal tool for agents to perform in-depth web data collection.
